utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each one is fully specified: (1) property includes type, location, price, currency, size, fees, taxes, and accessibility details; (2) financing includes method, fees, currency, down payment, and status; (3) legal_services includes name, cost, currency, service level, and status; (4) moving_services includes name, cost, currency, features, service level, and status; (5) setup_services includes property_survey and viewing with costs, currency, status, and details; (6) total_budget includes property cost, processing fees, legal, moving, survey, total costs, grand total, currency, and timeline. All are complete and detailed.
